summary: RETEST PASSED. Frontend fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/Reports.js (dedupeClosings + orphan merge in fetchReport) works end-to-end. Reports → 'إغلاق الصندوق' tab, dates 2026-06-01 → 2026-07-05 → 'تحديث' → individual view now shows exactly 2 rows (was 5), label 'من 2 إغلاق', delete-closing-0 and delete-closing-1 only, 'كل شفت بمفرده (2)'. Orphan 'كاشير كلوز QA' (449.75) is preserved (visible in DOM). 'كاشير اختبار' also present (single de-duplicated row). Value 899.5 does NOT appear anywhere. Cards: النقد المعدود = 100,000 IQD, المتوقع (النقدي) = 100,450 IQD, Short Cash = 450 IQD (= 449.75 rounded), Over Cash = 0 — all reflect the de-duplicated list. Combined ('مجمّع') view still renders summary from orders. No JS/console errors during the flow. Backend regression confirmed via curl: GET /api/reports/cash-register-closings returns 2 closings with stats.duplicates_removed=3 and total_sales=449.75; GET /api/reports/cash-register-closing returns the same 2 closings.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js is now ~5400 lines with the added dedupeClosings helpers — strongly recommend extracting CashRegisterClosingTab (and its dedupe logic) into its own module to keep concerns isolated.

Client-side dedupe now mirrors backend dedupe_shift_closings — a DRY violation kept for defensive reasons. Consider a single server-side aggregate endpoint returning ready-to-render rows to eliminate the risk of drift.
seed_data_creation: None. Existing tenant='default' dataset used (5 raw cash_register_closings + 5 shifts + 1 orphan QA closing). DB unchanged after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The iteration_264 critical bug (report tab showed 5 duplicates + 'من 5 إغلاق' + dropped orphan QA closing) is FULLY RESOLVED. dedupeClosings + orphan merge in Reports.js fetchReport produces exactly 2 rows for the 2026-06-01..2026-07-05 range, matching backend /api/reports/cash-register-closings. Playwright login flow that worked: fill [data-testid=login-email]/[login-password], click [data-testid=login-submit] (SPA — no Playwright expect_navigation), then wait for splash detach + goto /reports; open tab via get_by_role('tab', name='إغلاق الصندوق').click(force=True) + focus + Enter; set the tab's own two visible date inputs via native setter + input/change events; click 'تحديث'.
rca of the issue: N/A (retest passed). Prior fix: fetchReport now (1) builds closedShiftIds from the shifts feed, (2) picks orphanClosings = closingsFromHistory not in closedShiftIds, (3) dedupedClosed = dedupeClosings([...closedShifts, ...orphanClosings]) grouped by (branch_id, cashier_name-lc/cashier_id, business_day) collapsing overlapping-time OR identical (total_sales, orders_count, cash_sales) records and keeping the SMALLEST total_sales, and (4) falls back to dedupeClosings(closingsFromHistory) when no active shifts feed exists. This mirrors the backend rule and preserves orphan closings, so the report now automatically matches real sales without manual intervention or data deletion.
